quotes.selection: Pain is proof that you're alive. Embrace it.
general: A ghoul that plays at being human… or a human that plays at being a ghoul?
You're neither fully one nor the other. Just like me.
The One-Eyed King is not a person… it is an ideology.
I was born in a cage, and now I want to burn all cages down.
Stories are powerful. They can make people believe… even in monsters.
This world is wrong… twisted. That's why I write, to expose its lies.
Father… you chose peace. I chose war.
Books are lies that tell the truth.

Kaneki ID to be specified: Kaneki… your tragedy is what makes you beautiful.
Tatara ID to be specified: Our goals align, but never forget—I'm the Owl. I soar alone.

passive.name: Kakuja Evolution
passive.description: Every kill grants 5 Kakuja stacks. Assists grant 2 stacks. Clearing jungle camps grants 1 stack. Stacks evolve her ultimate into stronger phases. At Phase 5, reactivating the ultimate triggers Suicidal Mode where Eto explodes in RC energy.

h1.name: Blade of the Owl
h1.description: Eto stabs in a line in the target direction dealing physical damage to enemies hit. Against champions and large monsters, she heals for a percentage of her missing health based on number of targets hit. Her next basic attack is empowered, dealing bonus physical damage.

healing.amountPercent: 17% - 51% of missing health (based on number of targets hit)

h2.name: Thorned Trap
h2.description: From a target wall, Eto sprouts RC branches that form a circular net trap for 4.5 seconds. The trap roots and damages nearby enemy champions and small/medium jungle monsters on hit.

h3.name: Kagune Sleeve
h3.description: Eto fires a branching kagune tentacle forward. On hit, it slows the target champion for 2 seconds and deals physical damage.

h4.name: Kakuja: One-Eyed Owl
h4.description: Eto transforms into her Kakuja form, gaining HP, AD, armor, MR, and lifesteal, plus new abilities depending on evolution phase. Lasts until deactivated (except Phase 5) or killed. Phase 5 grants Suicidal Mode upon reactivation—an RC AoE explosion.

phase2.name: Phase 2 - Dual Blades
phase2.spikes: Back spikes reflect 15% of melee damage

phase3.name: Phase 3 - Pincers & Projectiles

pincer_active.effect: Roots target for 1.75s, deals physical damage

phase3.projectiles: Back periodically launches RC projectiles automatically
phase3.projectile_damage: 90 per projectile (+ 80% AD based on level)

phase4.name: Phase 4 - Full Arsenal
phase4.ability: Gains tail-tentacles for extra AoE auto-attacks
phase4.projectiles: RC projectiles increase in amount, damage, and frequency
phase4.projectile_bonus: 50 bonus damage (+ 80% AD based on level)

lore:
Eto Yoshimura, known in the human world as the popular novelist Sen Takatsuki, is in truth the feared One-Eyed Owl. Born as a half-human, half-ghoul, she grew up harboring hatred toward both worlds that rejected her, turning her into a manipulative, sadistic figure. Behind her playful and mocking persona lies a calculating mind determined to dismantle human society and elevate ghouls to dominance.

In battle, Eto wields her Ukaku kagune, allowing her to fight both at range and in close combat with lethal precision. Her true terror, however, emerges in her kakuja transformation into the Owl, a monstrous abomination that grows stronger with every life taken. With evolving forms that grant her immense power and durability, Eto embodies the uncontrollable chaos of ghoul evolution, a force of destruction that few can hope to withstand.
